source_text:
👇 Chick-fil-A BBQ Chicken Mac Hack @menufit.app code NICKKAZ

✅ 540 Cal • 50g Protein
Small Mac & Cheese
12-Count Grilled Nuggets
Zesty Buffalo + BBQ (mixed in)
Large Diet Coke

^ mix all together for Barbecue Chicken Mac & Cheese Bowl

expected.name: Chick-fil-A BBQ Chicken Mac Hack
steps: mix all together for Barbecue Chicken Mac & Cheese Bowl

notes: Agent-labeled from the frozen Instagram description before viewing parser output.
Large Diet Coke is an accompanying drink in the locally described meal, not a component of the named bowl.

Accepted after a general local-context rule connecting menu component lines to a following mix-for outcome instruction, plus generic handle-code suffix cleanup; no creator identity or exact ingredient phrase is used.
